Their vision came to life in 1986 with the founding of Richfeel, a brand blending nature and science to deliver expert care. For over 35 years, Richfeel Naturals has been trusted by leading professionals and customers alike, offering Physician-formulated, Made in India, Vegan, Cruelty-Free products designed to bring out your best self. Why Choose Us Every product we create blends the purity of nature, the precision of science, and the care of experts. From handpicked ingredients to physician-formulated blends, we hold ourselves to the highest standards — so you can feel confident in results that are safe, effective, and truly transformative. Inspired by Nature Pure, gentle care powered by nature’s healing touch. India’s 1st Trichologist Pioneering hair science in India. Physician-Formulated Expert blends where science meets self-care. Carefully Curated Vegan, cruelty-free, and handpicked for you. In-house Manufacturing Quality you can trust, crafted under one roof. Trusted by Generations Legacy of love, trust, & proven results for your skin & hair. Our Calendula Collection A collection crafted to soothe irritation, diminish inflammation, and encourage natural skin renewal. Enriched with potent antioxidants and nourishing botanicals, each product works to restore balance, enhance radiance, and leave your skin feeling comforted, refined, and beautifully revitalized. Shop Now Our Brahmi Collection An ancient herb, for strengthening hair from root to tip. This range deeply nourishes the scalp, reduces hair fall, and promotes natural growth while enhancing shine and vitality.
